title: New AI coding paradiagm - OpenAI Symphony
summary: OpenAI Symphony is a new AI coding paradigm that integrates harness setup, auto-testing, and workflow management. The presentation covers how Symphony works, its setup process, and integration with development workflows through WORKFLOW.md configuration.
